nodes.name: client.ts
nodes.summary: Axios HTTP client configuration with JWT authentication interceptor, error handling with toast notifications, and response unwrapping.

nodes.name: _api.get
nodes.summary: Axios GET wrapper with JWT token injection from localStorage and response error toast integration.

nodes.name: _api.post
nodes.summary: Axios POST wrapper with JSON content-type header and token injection.

nodes.name: business.ts
nodes.summary: Business API wrapper providing TypeScript methods for business operations against the backend API.

nodes.name: dashboard.ts
nodes.summary: Dashboard API client wrapping GET requests for dashboard statistics endpoint.

nodes.name: ipr.ts
nodes.summary: IPR API client with methods for trademark, copyright, and IP registration endpoints.

nodes.name: monitor.ts
nodes.summary: Monitor API client with methods for CRUD operations on monitoring tasks, results, and evidence packages.

nodes.name: notary.ts
nodes.summary: Notary API client wrapping blockchain notary registration and certificate retrieval endpoints.

nodes.name: publish.ts
nodes.summary: Publish API client for product listings, monetization channels, campaign management, and revenue tracking.

nodes.name: supply.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive supply chain API client with ~40 endpoint methods covering products, listings, channels, campaigns, licenses, orders, revenue, POD publishing, and mockup generation.

nodes.name: system.ts
nodes.summary: Most comprehensive frontend API client covering system settings, backups, notifications, dictionary data, plugins, email/WeChat integration, TOTP 2FA, sessions, watermark presets, work variants, subscriptions, commissions, and C2PA.

nodes.name: works.ts
nodes.summary: Works API client with CRUD operations, variant management, tag assignment, and file upload methods for creative work management.
